content.text: By using Branding Mart E-Shop, you agree to comply with our terms and conditions. Please read them carefully.

items: Provide accurate information during registration and checkout.
Ensure security of your account credentials.
Abide by all applicable laws and regulations.

content.text: This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.

items: Name and contact information
Demographics
Purchase history and preferences
Other information related to surveys or promotions
Provide and improve our services
Process transactions and orders
Send promotional information
Personalize your shopping experience

content.text: We implement appropriate technical and managerial measures to safeguard your information from unauthorized access.
Cookies help us improve website functionality and personalize content.
Our website may contain links to third-party sites. We are not responsible for their privacy practices.
All sales are subject to availability and pricing may change without notice.

items: Products are sold as described.
Promotions and discounts are valid only during specified periods.

content.text: We accept payments via credit/debit cards, bank transfers, and other approved methods.
Refunds are processed according to our return policy.

items: Cash refunds are allowed for payments made in cash.
Online payments are refunded to the original payment method.
Points used for purchases cannot be refunded in cash; they will return as store credit.

content.text: Products can be returned within 14 days, provided they are in original condition with packaging intact.

items: Return requests must be submitted through your account.
Refunds follow the rules specified under Refunds section.
Items damaged by the customer are not eligible for return.

content.text: All transactions, credits, and refunds are recorded in the customer account for tracking purposes.

items: Points earned from purchases can only be used as store credit.
Points cannot be redeemed for cash unless specified in special promotions.
Credits are non-transferable and valid for 12 months.
